Class AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
AuxiliaryContract, SpecificationElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
BlockContractImpl, LoopContractImpl
public abstract class AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl extends Object implements AuxiliaryContract
Abstract base class for all default implementations of the sub-interfaces of AuxiliaryContract.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    protected static class 
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Combinator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
    This class is used to combine multiple contracts for the same block and apply them simultaneously.
    protected static class 
    AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Creator<T extends AuxiliaryContract>
    This class contains a builder method for AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpls (AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl.Creator.create()).

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface AuxiliaryContract

    AuxiliaryContract.Terms, AuxiliaryContract.Variables, AuxiliaryContract.VariablesCreator

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl

      protected AbstractAuxiliaryContractImpl(String baseName, StatementBlock block, List<Label> labels, IProgramMethod method, JModality.JavaModalityKind modalityKind, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> preconditions, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> freePreconditions, JTerm measuredBy, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> postconditions, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> freePostconditions, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> modifiableClauses, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> freeModifiableClauses, ImmutableList<InfFlowSpec> infFlowSpecs, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, boolean transactionApplicable, Map<LocationVariable, Boolean> hasModifiable, Map<LocationVariable, Boolean> hasFreeModifiable, ImmutableSet<FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?>> functionalContracts)
      Parameters:
      baseName - the base name.
      block - the block this contract belongs to.
      labels - all labels belonging to the block.
      method - the method containing the block.
      modalityKind - this contract's modality kind.
      preconditions - this contract's preconditions on every heap.
      measuredBy - this contract's measured-by term.
      postconditions - this contract's postconditions on every heap.
      modifiableClauses - this contract's modifiable clauses on every heap.
      freeModifiableClauses - this contract's free modifiable clauses on every heap.
      infFlowSpecs - this contract's information flow specifications.
      variables - this contract's variables.
      transactionApplicable - whether this contract is applicable for transactions.
      hasModifiable - a map specifying on which heaps this contract has a modifiable clause.
      functionalContracts - the functional contracts corresponding to this contract.

  • Method Details

    • getBaseName

      public String getBaseName()
      Specified by:
      getBaseName in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      this contract's base name.

    • getBlock

      public StatementBlock getBlock()
      Specified by:
      getBlock in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      the block this contract belongs to.

    • getLabels

      public List<Label> getLabels()
      Specified by:
      getLabels in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      all labels belonging to AuxiliaryContract.getBlock()

    • getMethod

      public IProgramMethod getMethod()
      Specified by:
      getMethod in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      the method containing AuxiliaryContract.getBlock()

    • getKJT

      public KeYJavaType getKJT()
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Returns the KeYJavaType representing the class/interface to which the specification element belongs.
      Specified by:
      getKJT in interface SpecificationElement

    • getModalityKind

      public JModality.JavaModalityKind getModalityKind()
      Specified by:
      getModalityKind in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      this contract's modality.

    • getPlaceholderVariables

      public AuxiliaryContract.Variables getPlaceholderVariables()
      Description copied from interface: AuxiliaryContract
      Returns the set of placeholder variables created during this contract's instantiation. These are replaced by the real variables with the same names when the contract is applied.
      Specified by:
      getPlaceholderVariables in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      the placeholder variables used created during this contracts instantiation.
      See Also:
      • AuxiliaryContractBuilders.VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar

    • getVisibility

      public VisibilityModifier getVisibility()
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Returns the visibility of the invariant (null for default visibility)
      Specified by:
      getVisibility in interface SpecificationElement

    • isTransactionApplicable

      public boolean isTransactionApplicable()
      Specified by:
      isTransactionApplicable in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      true if and only if this contract is applicable for transactions.

    • isReadOnly

      public boolean isReadOnly(Services services)
      Specified by:
      isReadOnly in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      true if and only if this contract is read-only.

    • hasModifiableClause

      public boolean hasModifiableClause(LocationVariable heap)
      Description copied from interface: AuxiliaryContract
      Returns true iff the method (according to the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
      Specified by:
      hasModifiableClause in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      Returns:
      whether this contract is strictly pure.

    • hasFreeModifiableClause

      public boolean hasFreeModifiableClause(LocationVariable heap)
      Description copied from interface: AuxiliaryContract
      Returns true iff the method (according to the free part of the contract) does not modify the heap at all, i.e., iff it is "strictly pure."
      Specified by:
      hasFreeModifiableClause in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      Returns:
      whether this contract is strictly pure.

    • getVariables

      public AuxiliaryContract.Variables getVariables()
      Specified by:
      getVariables in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      the original used variables like self, result etc..

    • getVariablesAsTerms

      public AuxiliaryContract.Terms getVariablesAsTerms(Services services)
      Specified by:
      getVariablesAsTerms in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the original used variables like self, result etc. as terms.

    • getTerm

      public JTerm getTerm(JTerm term, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Replaces variables in a map of terms
      Parameters:
      term - a term.
      variables - replacements for getVariables()
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the term with every occurrence of a variable from getVariables() replaced.

    • getTerm

      public JTerm getTerm(JTerm term, JTerm heap, AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms, Services services)
      Replaces variables in a map of terms
      Parameters:
      term - a term.
      heap - the replacement heap
      terms - replacements for getVariables()
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the term with every occurrence of a variable from getVariables() replaced.

    • getMby

      public JTerm getMby()
      Specified by:
      getMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

    • getMby

      public JTerm getMby(AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      variables - variables to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

    • getMby

      public JTerm getMby(LocationVariable selfVar, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      selfVar - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

    • getMby

      public JTerm getMby(Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> heapTerms, JTerm selfTerm, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> atPres, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heapTerms - the heaps to use.
      selfTerm - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's measured-by clause if it has one, null otherwise.

    • getPrecondition

      public JTerm getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap, LocationVariable self, Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> atPres, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      self - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getPrecondition

      public JTerm getPrecondition(LocationVariable heapVariable, JTerm heap, JTerm self, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> atPres, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heapVariable - the heap to use.
      heap - the heap to use.
      self - the self variable to use to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getPrecondition

      public JTerm getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getPrecondition

      public JTerm getPrecondition(LocationVariable heap, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      variables - the variables to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap with all free program variables replaced by those in variables.

    • getPrecondition

      public JTerm getPrecondition(LocationVariable heapVariable, JTerm heap, AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getPrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heapVariable - the heap to use.
      heap - the heap to use.
      terms - the terms to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

      public JTerm getPostcondition(LocationVariable heap, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getPostcondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      variables - the variables to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's postcondition on the specified heap.

    • getPostcondition

      public JTerm getPostcondition(LocationVariable heapVariable, JTerm heap, AuxiliaryContract.Terms terms, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getPostcondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heapVariable - the heap to use.
      heap - the heap to use.
      terms - the terms to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getPostcondition

      Specified by:
      getPostcondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's precondition on the specified heap.

    • getFreePrecondition

      public JTerm getFreePrecondition(LocationVariable heap, LocationVariable self, Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> atPres, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getFreePrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      self - the self variable to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's free precondition on the specified heap.

    • getFreePrecondition

      public JTerm getFreePrecondition(LocationVariable heapVariable, JTerm heap, JTerm self, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> atPres, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getFreePrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heapVariable - the heap to use.
      heap - the heap to use.
      self - the self variable to use to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      atPres - a map from every variable var to \old(var) to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's free precondition on the specified heap.

    • getFreePrecondition

      public JTerm getFreePrecondition(LocationVariable heap, Services services)

      Parameters:

      services - services.

    • getFreePrecondition

      public JTerm getFreePrecondition(LocationVariable heap, AuxiliaryContract.Variables variables, Services services)
      Specified by:
      getFreePrecondition in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      heap - the heap to use.
      variables - the variables to use instead of AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables().
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this contract's free precondition on the specified heap with all free program variables replaced by those in variables.

    • hasMby

      public boolean hasMby()
      Specified by:
      hasMby in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      true if and only if this contract has a measured-by clause.

      • AuxiliaryContract.getMby()

      Specified by:
      hasInfFlowSpecs in interface AuxiliaryContract

    • getInstantiationSelfTerm

      public JTerm getInstantiationSelfTerm()
      Specified by:
      getInstantiationSelfTerm in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      the self variable as a term.

    • getInstantiationSelfTerm

      public JTerm getInstantiationSelfTerm(TermServices services)
      Specified by:
      getInstantiationSelfTerm in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      Returns:
      the term internally used for self or a newly instantiated one. Use with care - it is likely that this is *not* the right "self" for you.

    • getTarget

      public IProgramMethod getTarget()
      Specified by:
      getTarget in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      the method in which the block is located.

    • equals

      Overrides:
      equals in class Object

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()

      hashCode in class Object

    • getFunctionalContracts

      public ImmutableSet<FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?>> getFunctionalContracts()
      Specified by:
      getFunctionalContracts in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Returns:
      all FunctionalAuxiliaryContracts with a valid id that correspond to this BlockSpecificationElement. Unless this contract is a combination of other contracts, the resulting set will only contain one element.

    • setFunctionalContract

      public void setFunctionalContract(FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<?> contract)
      Specified by:
      setFunctionalContract in interface AuxiliaryContract
      Parameters:
      contract - the new functional contract.
      See Also:
      • AuxiliaryContract.getFunctionalContracts()

    • createReplacementMap

      protected Map<LocationVariable, LocationVariable> createReplacementMap(AuxiliaryContract.Variables newVariables, Services services)
      Parameters:
      newVariables - new variables.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a map from every variable in getVariables() to its counterpart in newVariables.

    • createReplacementMap

      protected Map<JTerm,JTerm> createReplacementMap(JTerm newHeap, AuxiliaryContract.Terms newTerms, Services services)
      Parameters:
      newHeap - new base heap.
      newTerms - new terms.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      a map from every term in getVariables().termify() to its counterpart in newTerms, and from the base heap to heap.
